Team Live:Using only the scratching posts, remove as many balls from your suit as possible. Your teammates may throw balls from the throwing spots throughout. The throwing spots may not be moved. Also, if you're in a team of three, the two non-suit wearers must hold hands throughout.
Sneakiest thing.
Make these things the same colour as those things. People and bottles must stay on their spots at all times. You may perform 10 bottle stamps and two bottle squeezes.
Put three single-digit numbers in the slots then open the second task.

Make exactly 99 holes in this piece of paper. Your holes must have a diameter of at least three millimetres and form a recognisable picture or pattern. If you make more or fewer than 99 holes, you are disqualified. Also, if you look at Alex or speak to Alex at any point, you are disqualified.
Combine two of your things to equal the height of the thing said by Greg. You may not use any of your things twice. Worst guess each round is eliminated.
Best Greg Davies merchandise that isn't on the market but should be on the market.
Fill the glass up to the line from the furthest distance. If you use a hose and someone else uses a hose, both hose users are disqualified.

Do what Alex does immediately after Alex does it in exactly the same time as Alex does it. You must press your button when you're satisfied you have done what Alex has done. If you do not complete an activity, 10 seconds will be added to your time.
Write the name of a profession in this hole, then open the task.

Convince the Taskmaster that your feet are not in ice when they are in ice or that your feet are in ice when they aren't in ice. You must keep your feet either in ice or not in ice for 30 seconds before the Taskmaster makes his judgement. If the Taskmaster is correct, you are disqualified.
Most wonderful wooden thing that they've owned for a while.
Build a tower out of the cans in the lab. You must put on your blindfold in this room and wear it properly for the rest of the task.
Connect the most individual parts of one person to individual parts of another person. All members of your team must be connected.

Get the duck into the lake. You must not touch the beak. If the duck leaves the course, it must re-enter at the point it left the course. If your duck touches the boundary or a flamingo or a pineapple, one minute will be added to your time.
Say whether you think the next item is heavier or lighter than the previous item. If you are wrong, you are eliminated.
Best sign.
Pull the sword from the stone. You may not force the sword or break the stone.
Make a cheeky picture on this piece of wood using nails and one continuous piece of wire. Also, if any egg timers stop, you must stare at the camera shaking your head for 10 seconds.
Make mischief.
Write down one thing you like and one thing you don't like.
The present you've been given that raises the most questions.
Get the ball in the hole. Nothing may touch the ball. After you touch one tool, you may not touch another tool for one minute. If you decide to touch the welly, you must only do so with your foot.

Get underneath the most unique things. Alex will write down your things when you shout "I'm underneath it". If you get underneath something that someone else gets underneath, you both lose five things from your total.
Choose a new nickname based on something you do in the next 20 minutes.

Team Live:One member of your team must lie on three of the squares and go to sleep. After they have taken their position, they must not move until the task is over. Taking it in turns, the other team members must try to land their cushion in each of the three sleep squares.
Best thing for a grown-up that is meant for a child.
Make a sausage. You can only use seven ingredients, each beginning with the letters of the word "sausage". You may not order sausages.

Complete all the tasks, then put the tubs back on your heads. One person must be looking at a teammate at all times during the tasks. Also, one person must be shaking their head and smiling at all times during the tasks and one person must only shout.
Recreate a well-known piece of art on these memo squares. You must draw on every memo square, but you may only look at one memo square at a time.
Write the name of a different animal on each face of your dice. The most boring animal rolled will be eliminated.
Best thing that has five things on it.
Burst this balloon from the furthest distance. You must not be looking at the balloon when you burst it.
Make the most cool but scary gang using these eyes.
Get all the water in the vase. If you spill any water from the plate, you are disqualified. You may not leave the lab.
Sip your drink. You may only touch the loo roll and you may not reach over the line.
Greatest thing that makes quite a loud noise when you shake it.
Avoid the rubbish robots. You may not remove your blindfold at any point and at least one of your knees must be touching the floor throughout.
Recreate your teammate's garage scene.
Present a piece called "Heads, Shoulders, Knees and Toes".

Pass the pineapples amongst you for 15 seconds while the Taskmaster shuts his eyes and has a little think. When the Taskmaster opens his eyes, he will say if he thinks you are holding a pineapple behind your back or not. If he accuses you wrongly, you will get a point.

EpisodeTitle: I'm off to find a robin
Description: The thing that is most guaranteed to make you groan.

EpisodeTitle: I'm off to find a robin
Description: Do whatever you like with these switches for five minutes. You will then do a task in the lab for five minutes. The conditions in the lab will change according to when you switch the switches in here.

EpisodeTitle: I'm off to find a robin
Description: Pie Wayne in the face. Wayne is outside the front door. You may not touch Wayne nor step on the red green. If you miss Wayne with the pie, you must copy Wayne's dance moves for 10 seconds.

EpisodeTitle: I'm off to find a robin
Description: Put yourself somewhere within the boundary. The person furthest from everyone else wins. The people closest together both lose two points. Also, throughout the task, you must behave really weirdly.

EpisodeTitle: I'm off to find a robin
Description: Catch three balls on your head. After you've caught a ball, you must shout "ball". You may not step off your circles, move your circles, adjust your arms or touch the balls with your hands.
Best single-word object you own and love that gets the best reaction when introduced following a drum roll.

This is not a team task. Find the secret task. You must never be in the same room as each other. Whenever the air horn sounds, you must replace anything you are holding and change rooms. Everyone must find the secret task before the task ends.
Complete the fortune trail.

Convince a child you're asleep. You must either have a nap lasting one minute with your face visible throughout - during this nap, you must snore and sleepwalk - or you must have a nap lasting one minute where you are not in bed at all, but the child thinks you are. During this nap, you must snore and sleeptalk.

Team Live:Mime the proverb on your card. There will be three minute-long rounds. You must be waving at each other throughout your attempt, but you can make a single noise of the Taskmaster's choosing.
The bit of old crap that Greg likes the best.

Drive across the finish line. You must obey all the rules of the road and must only stop your vehicle at a traffic signal. If you disobey a rule, Alex will blow his whistle and you must return to the start for a 10-second driving lesson.
Make Greg the best gift. Your items must cost no more than £50.
Feed the clown the most cards. No part of you must cross the threshold of the stage.
Watch Alex's parade then answer the questions. You may not make any notes during the parade.
The thing that, when you turn it round, gives you the biggest shock.
Do something shocking but family-friendly with this doughnut.

Demonstrate the most effective high-intensity four-part exercise routine. Each of your four exercises must be original and must take place on this mat. The first must last eight seconds, the second four, the third two and the fourth one second long.[2]
Give your guest the best service.
Throw a ball into the bathtub from behind the rope. You may not touch the rope. If a ball ends up not in the bathtub, you are eliminated.
Most fun thing to be carrying when you enter a room full of people you don't know.

Eat these poppadoms. After each mouthful, you must lose a letter of the alphabet from your vocabulary, then either compliment Greg or insult Alex. Your insults and compliments must all be different. If you use a lost letter at any time, 10g will be added to your final poppadom weight.
Draw a picture of yourself eating some fruit on this tablet. You may not touch the touchscreen with any part of your hands. Also, throughout the task, you must become increasingly angry.
Make these things pop when the timer hits zero.
Say whether the item will fit through the hole or not fit through the hole. If you get it right, you lose an egg.
Best thing that you would wish for if you had one wish from a genie.

Be the best waiter. You must serve Alex all his food, drink and cutlery as it is currently set. If you drop or spill any items, you must clap for a full minute or else you will be disqualified. No running.
Give yourself a disadvantage for the next task.
Do something really stupid. You must not hurt yourself or anyone else.

Don't say the Taskmaster's favourite thing. Alex will say a category. One at a time, you must shout a thing that falls into that category within two seconds of the previous person. If you pause, repeat, make a mistake or say the Taskmaster's favourite thing, you are eliminated.
Most glorious thing that sounds a bit like "Greg Davies" if you mumble it.
Do the riskiest thing involving this egg without breaking this egg.

Create the best single picture of an animal doing something surprising. All six blinds must be fully and equally involved in your picture. You may not see each other's work and you may only say two words at a time. After the task, your pieces will be lined up next to each other in this order: 1) Shortest Wikipedia entry, 2) Best show at the Edinburgh Fringe winner, 3) Smallest shoe size, 4) The person whom Alex said "hello" to first, 5) Most Twitter followers, 6) Lowest-scoring full name in Scrabble. You may not move outside of your segment.
Hoopla Gary before he crosses the finish line. Your time is doubled every time one of your limbs gets wet.
Bring your sausage to life. You may not write any words on your drawing.
Most fun thing to turn upside down.
Rescue the cat. The cat must come out of the top hole. Your head may not enter the dome. The door must remain closed.
Do the most epic thing using green material and this green screen onesie.

Stick the heaviest thing to the board using three of the ingredients on the shelves. Once you've chosen your ingredients, you may not change your mind. You must choose your thing in the first two minutes.
Team Live:Guess the movie that your teammate is saying. Your teammate can only say the first three letters of each word of the movie title.
Best thing for a person that is meant for an animal.

Work out who is following you. You must stare at the duck at all times and take an average-length step towards the duck every time it quacks. If the person following you agrees with you, they will say the name of a mammal. If the person following you disagrees with you, they will say the name of a bird. If the person following you doesn't know if they agree or disagree with you, they will say the name of an amphibian.
Complete the jobstacle course. Each job must be completed to a satisfactory-quality level. The baby must remain in the baby carrier at all times except during nappy change.
Create tension.
Catch the most monsters in your boxes. The monsters must propel themselves from the table.
Greatest thing to give to a granny.

Work out who you are shaking hands with. You must only shake hands with the hands and you may not handle the hands in any other way. You may chop off a total of three fingers and one thumb but if you set off the health and safety emergency alarm, you are disqualified. Also, you may not look around, over, under or through the fence.
Create the biggest and best dot-to-dot picture.

Fastest team to (go to the lab,) discover the (cake, eat one half, put the) other half (in the post box, put a flower on top) of this (task and then sit on top of this) task wins (five points.) You must (not necessarily) always hold hands. (That's up to you.)
Pass all your loo roll through your loo roll inner tube. If your loo roll breaks at any point, you must put down your loo roll and put both your hands in the air for 10 seconds before carrying on.
Most extraordinary picture.

Be the most impressive load bearer. You must stand on the doormat, wave with one hand above your head and give a nice big thumbs up with the other whilst bearing the most impressive load. Your load must not be touching anything other than you.
Take the most dramatic photo of yourself in mid-air. You may take five photos.
Tie yourself to the bed. You must be horizontal whilst in the lab. If you pull down the terrible tie, you are disqualified.
Park a vehicle in the parking bay. Your vehicle must be rolled whilst standing on the spot and the worst parker each round is eliminated.
Best thing that you can get into.
Have the most exciting thumb war with Alex.

Make the most moves on the movement circles. Your teammate must flip a bottle, then throw a dart at each dartboard to create a move. If they get a bulls-eye, you have free choice. Also, if they successfully land the bottle flip, your teammate may place a dart anywhere in the dartboard.
Team Live:Completely cover your teammate in rubber rings. Catchers must face the Taskmaster at all times with their hands above their head. Throwers must stay behind the white line.
Snazziest hollow thing.
What have you caught? You may only give one answer.
Perform a recognisable piece of classical music without using any musical instrument. You may not hum, sing, whistle or that sort of thing.
Take Alex to one side and do the following things to him: Confess your favourite piece of kitchen equipment, scream a body part of your choice in his face, declare a gardening tool in a silly voice.
Paint a face on your ball. You may not touch your balls with anything other than your tools. Also, you may not remove your helmet.
The thing of yours Greg would most like to squeeze in his mighty hands.
Flick, flip and flap a flip-flop, flan and flapjack. You may only flick, flip and flap once.

In the next task, you must say the word "umbrella" five times. If you say the word "umbrella" five times and no-one else says the word "umbrella", you get two bonus points. Your teammates must hear you say your umbrellas and you must not mention the concept of a bonus task. If you fail, you lose two points.
Make this mannequin come alive.
Write down a letter of the alphabet.
Most splendid spherical thing.
Create a new tradition to celebrate Assistant's Day.
Peg a sock, bin a sock, then don a sock on an appendage. Each single action must take place between bleeps.
Make the back of your head look like the front of a head. You may not just make a mask. You must demonstrate your new front-of-head in action.

Bounce a ball on the bar. In round one, your ball must bounce once before falling off the bar. In round two, your ball must bounce twice before falling off the bar, and so on. Each player has one life.
The thing that gives the most hope for the future of the human race.
Find and complete the real task. Each task has a 1% chance of being the real task.
Hug your special friend. Every time you touch a letter, you must turn it over and one minute will be added to your time.
Present the best new short-form shiny floor American gameshow. Alex will be the contestant, one of you must be his rival and somebody must win.

Crawl around behind the wall for 20 seconds. On Greg's command, you must then pop up from behind the wall. If Greg correctly predicts where you will pop up, you will be eliminated. If there is a tie in the final, the round is replayed.
Best thing that has been inside you.

Do not say any of this out loud. Carry out each instruction before reading the next. You must remain silent until you've completed all four instructions. Stare at camera number one for at least thirty seconds without smiling. Eat an imaginary fly that has just landed on you. Act like you don't like how it feels in your stomach at all. Look under the 6th, 33rd, 56th, and 91st letters of this task.
Knock over exactly 100 cans. You must throw all five balls and pull one rope nice and hard. You must stay on the spot at all times and you may not move the spot.
Do the most beautiful thing with bubbles.

Drink the vinegar. On your turn, you can either drink from one straw or not drink at all and get a clue from Alex instead. You must stand on the spot when choosing your straw and you must never stray from the spot. Only the vinegar drinker wins.
Most serious object that looks quite silly.

Become the best multi-headed creature. Your creature must prove they are the best by doing something impressive. Also, during that impressive thing, they must speak one word at a time and explain what it is they are doing and why it is impressive.
Capture the most remarkable footage on this doorbell camera.

Spin the wheel the same number of times or more as the person before you. You must land on the same color each time or else you're eliminated. If you land on gold, you are automatically through to the next round and the next person has to spin it one more time than the previous person.
The object with the most soul.
Put a rocket in your pocket.
Recreate a famous 2D piece of art in 3D.
Win the pub quiz by cheating. If the quizmaster notices you cheating, you will lose a point and you must use a different method of cheating.

Rustle Russell, fill Phil, mark Mark, rob Rob and pat Pat. When Alex blows his whistle, you must all either immediately say one word to the person next to you or perform one action. The people may only say yes or no. If you perform the wrong action, you are disqualified. You will then meet a new person.

EpisodeTitle: I'm a girl who likes a clean line
Description: The thing most likely to make Greg say "Oh, Christ, now that is badass!".

EpisodeTitle: I'm a girl who likes a clean line
Description: Push the envelope the furthest.

EpisodeTitle: I'm a girl who likes a clean line
Description: Take a bite out of Alex's carrot. Alex will ring his bell every 10 seconds. You must laugh constantly throughout. You must both only walk at  gentle pace.

EpisodeTitle: I'm a girl who likes a clean line
Description: Pick the Taskmaster's locket from its pocket. Every time you pick an incorrect pocket, you must high-five Alex. If you touch, tamper or peek into a pocket you must pick it.

EpisodeTitle: I'm a girl who likes a clean line
Description: Team Live:Gather a herd of animals with exactly 22 legs. You may not harm any animals. You may only use animals on this side of the wall and you may not use each other. On Alex's whistle, you must hurl one of your herd over the wall. When your herd has 22 legs, only then may you don your tutus.
The thing that is best when you add liquid to it.

Direct the robot to its charging station and plug it in. You must give the robot an instruction every 10 seconds. The robot will ignore any instructions that contain the letter O or E. You may not touch the robot.
Make the strongest smell. You must seal your smell in this jar and the Taskmaster will open it in the studio.
Present the most heart-warming final story for a local news programme.
Land your skydiver closest to the seal. You must catapult your skydiver with the catapult. Furthest from the target each round is eliminated.

EpisodeTitle: A dance as old as time itself
Description: Most fun thing to put in Alex's pocket without him knowing.

EpisodeTitle: A dance as old as time itself
Description: Put one fish in the frying pan. Dottiest fish wins. Your task ends when you put a fish in the frying pan.

EpisodeTitle: A dance as old as time itself
Description: Create, handle and voice the most charismatic new children's television puppet sidekick for Alex.

EpisodeTitle: A dance as old as time itself
Description: Defuse the robot. You must cut all the wires but one. If you cut the danger wire, the robot will spew and you will be disqualified. You must keep your goggles on at all times.

EpisodeTitle: A dance as old as time itself
Description: Correctly guess this person's job. You must ask a yes or no question on your turn. If you take more than 10 seconds to ask your question, you miss a go.
The object that is bigger than your head that you would most like to carry with you for the rest of your life if you had to carry an object with you for the rest of your life.
Ring the bell. You may not look up.
You must lie throughout the next task. Every time you tell the truth, everyone in your team will lose an actual Taskmaster point.
Eat and obey five fortune cookies.
Throw a beanbag onto the island. If you knock over a can, you are disqualified. If you miss the island, you are disqualified.
The thing that most makes Greg scratch his chin.
Put on the special glasses.

Be at the highest number barrel when Alex blows his whistle again. You may only move to the next barrel when you have completed the challenge at the previous barrel. If you fail a barrel challenge twice in a row, you must move back to the first barrel. If you are at an even-numbered barrel at the end of the barrel task, you are disqualified.
Label a part of your body, make a surprising noise and do something interesting with your legs.

Team Live:Say the same word at the same time. Alex will give you a category. Taking it in turns, team members must both say one word that fits the category at the same time. If both team members say the same word at the same time, they win the round. Also, you must not say word that has been said before.
Best item for keeping things in that isn't just a regular item for keeping things in.
Walk exactly one furlong in exactly 10 minutes. You may not make use of technology except to make three five-second phone calls. Also, you may not remove the hat.
Clean the most profound picture of majestic nature on a dirty thing.

Place all the balls in the gutter and the gutter on the cow. The gutter must not enter the dome. You must not use anything floppy during your attempt. For every ball you touch, one minute will be added to your time. For every ball that touches the floor, 10 minutes will be added to your time. The task is over when the full gutter of balls is balancing by itself on the cow.
Predict whether each item will float or not float.
The thing most likely to make your buttocks clench.

Say how many chairs are in this cinema. You may only give one answer. You must not say any numbers until you give your answer and you must say the name of every object that appears on the screen. If you miss an object, one minute will be added to your time. For every chair you get wrong, one minute will be added to your time.
Either throw five fives in a row or do 100 press-ups or eat a raw onion or find the needle in the haystack or sit silently for 10 minutes. You may only attempt two of these things.
Present "The Goose".
When Greg says "eyes down", you must look down. When Greg says "eyes up", you must immediately look at another contestant. If the contestant is also looking at you, you are both eliminated.
The source of the greatest pride.
Don as many gloves as possible.
Do something you regret.

Transfer the most water from the bucket to the bottle using only the contents of one of these bins. You may open one bin every minute, but you must use the contents of the bin you open last. You may not touch or move the bucket or the bottle.

Draw the most accurate picture of the contents of the box. If you answer Greg's question correctly, you may look in the box for 0.1 seconds. If you answer Greg's question incorrectly, you must start your picture again. You may only answer Greg's question if you are the first to shout your surname.
The object that reminds you of school the most in a good way.
Put your hands on the hands, shut your eyes and keep them shut until you hear the whistle.
Do something really cool.
Win the Pealympics. There are five events. The top two performers in each event get a medal.

Get the most raisins in your wine glass. You may only touch raisins with your mouth. You must not bend at the waist and your hands must be behind your back at all times. Also, every time you drop a raisin into your wine glass, you must shout the name of one of your competitors. That competitor must immediately shout their name too. If they don't, Alex will empty their wine glass.
Snootiest thing.
Commentate on yourself achieving something really tricky, then achieve that really tricky thing.

Give Alex exactly 100 marbles on a plate and an eggcup full of tepid water. One of you must always be sitting down, one of you must always be jumping and one of you must always be clapping your hands. You must each change your action every 30 seconds and no-one may hold anything for more than five seconds at a time.
Get the most liquid in this can. You may not leave the Submaravan.
Choose an item from each box and place them on the corresponding half of your table.
Best thing for a middle-aged man to keep on his bedside table.
Answer the cheese phone. Every time you move, Alex will play the French horn. If you choose to only use your sense of smell, Alex will not play the French horn and your final time will be halved.

Move the most cushions from one bin to the other bin without Alex correctly saying what colour cape you're wearing. You must be wearing a cape on the outside of your clothes throughout. You may not move the bins. If a cushion touches the ground, the task is over. Alex will alternately open then shut his eyes for as many seconds as there are letters in each of the words of this task.
Paint the best picture of the Taskmaster and his assistant having fun on the canvas in the lab. You may only enter the lab when there are 30 seconds left in the task.
Team Live:Take it in turns as teams to obey Greg's previous order. If you hesitate, your team loses the round.
The thing that least suits its name if you shout it loudly while we're all looking at it on the screen.

Put the most wetsuits on mannequins. The mannequins must be wearing their wetsuits properly. Also, you must tiptoe throughout and put your finger on your lips and say "shhh" at least once every 20 seconds.
Convince the other team that the following things are the opposite of what they are.
Tell Alex why the light bulb turns on. You may not touch or tamper with the light bulb.
Win a game of Front Ham. One at a time, each person must discard three socks from the washing line and add one. If all your coloured socks are removed, you are eliminated.
Best object to bestow in your will to a relative against whom you are seeking revenge.

Be the least annoying person round the campfire. You must either sing a folk song, tell a ghost story or recite a beat poem and not be annoying. Your song, story or poem must either be about fast cars, barbecues or DIY and it can contain no more than 100 words.
Draw the monster. You must not turn around or leave the car. If you fail to honk your horn when you see a lollipop lady, you must surrender your picture for 30 seconds.
Shorten these pencils and place your shortened pencils in the pencil case.
Pop a balloon when you hear its colour. Last to pop is eliminated. If you pop early, you are eliminated.
The thing that is nicest to open.

Work out what Alex has on the very top of his head. The very top of your head must never be more than five foot six inches from the ground. You may ask Alex yes-or-no questions, but Alex will only answer using his exciting new numbers system.
Make yourselves look like one of you is the parent of the others, then capture your relationship with a classic family home video moment.
Teach the Taskmaster's Assistant a lesson he'll never forget.

Don't blow the last thing off the table. If you don't blow anything off the table, you are eliminated. If you do blow the last thing off the table, you are eliminated. You must stay on the spot and you must not touch the table.
Biggest anticlimax.
What is in the one yellow box? You may only give one answer. All the information is in the task.
Eat this yoghurt with the most/least dignity.

Put at least six litres of water in the vase. You must either use bucket A and route A or bucket B and route B. If you choose A, you must complete one of the tasks at every obstacle. If you choose B, you must trot throughout. You must stay within the arena at all times and must never touch the vase.

Team Live:Get one of your balls into your bucket.  Your spoons must be poking through the fence when touching the ball, and only your spoons may touch your ball. You may not touch the other team's balls or buckets or spoons. You must always be on your side of the fence and your balls must always be on the other. If your ball touches the ground, you must start again.
Best object that you've borrowed from a fairly close friend.

Knock over all 10 skittles in 10 minutes. The final skittle should fall exactly when the whistle sounds. If any skittle is left standing after 10 minutes, you have failed. You must stay behind the rope at all times.
Each person must write down three words to describe a memorable scene. You must be silent throughout and your teammates must not see what you have written.
Obey the autocue.
Say whether the next person will have a higher or lower number of things than the previous person. The category of things will change each time. If you make two mistakes, you are eliminated.
Most satisfying thing you could use as a jelly mould.
Place something somewhere surprising.
Create the most exciting new bodies so that you and Alex become a dynamic duo. You must then do something dynamic together for no more than a minute.
Conquer the multitask. You must complete every task in every room you enter.

Team Live:Say a word that fits the category given by the Taskmaster, then press your button and the time will pass to the other team. Team members must take it in turns to say words and no words may be repeated during the task.
The thing most likely to make you do a double-take.
Completely fill the yellow box with sand. Once you have touched a box, you must hold that box for the rest of the task.
Freeze on your spot in the most powerful pose in five minutes from now. You must be touching two of the objects.
Provide the best drive-through experience.
Get the most carrot in your bucket. You must hold your hands behind your back at all times.
A very soft thing which would be most beneficial for Greg Davies.
Honk the horn.

Roll an object onto the target. You must release your object from behind this line. You may not move the line or target and you may not affect your object after release. You must use the first type of object you touch and can have three attempts with that type of object, and must not go within Greg's height of the target.
Do something behind this curtain that sounds disgusting but is actually really nice.
End up on your spot. You must obey the Taskmaster's instructions.
The object that is hardest to describe.
Identify Alex's five things. You may only use one sense. If you choose hearing, you get five points per item; smell, four points; taste, three points; touch, two points; sight, one point.
Write a superpower on the little clipboard.
Take the most surprising thing out of this bag.
Guess how many things the Taskmaster's assistant has on him. Worst answer is eliminated.
The thing you were least likely to bring in from your home.
Make the most accurate little model of the Chesham United mascot. You may only see what is inside two of the toilet tents. Go Generals.

Discover the name of the person in the lab. You must take it in turns to ask one question and the person may only say yes or no. The other team members must remain in this room until the questioner returns. Each person in your team must address the person in the lab by the correct name before the task is complete.
Create your own Snakes and Steps board. You must add one snake and one set of steps. You must also add one mystery box. The instruction inside the mystery box is up to you.

Turn your cup triangle completely upside down. Your upside-down cup triangle must be free-standing and you must obey the instructions written on each layer. If any cups fall, you must completely start again. You may not affect other people's cup triangles.
The present that would most make you say this if you received it on your birthday: "Oh, that's just the most gorgeous gift ever!".
What number has Alex written down? You may ask no more than 20 questions. Alex may only say yes or no, and you must be increasingly surprised by every answer.
Make a love heart using your body, the body of your teammates and any other items of your choosing.

Win the horse race. You must do one of the following things: Eat something without looking at the food, spin the wheel at least 720 degrees, throw a dart at the dartboard. If you eat an olive, your horse will advance two steps. If you eat a grape, your horse will retreat three steps. If you throw a dart in an olive, your horse will advance five steps. If you throw a dart in a grape, your horse will retreat eight steps. If the wheel lands on an olive, your horse will advance 10 steps. If the wheel lands on a grape, your horse will retreat 15 steps. You must stay on the spot and you must not move the spot.
Fill out your form.
A possession that would most confuse a future archaeologist if you were buried holding it.
Pull something from that red green onto this red green using this string. Throughout your pull, you must remain on this red green. Your thing must travel through or over all the obstacles.
Make things genuinely awkward.
Do the most accurate finger painting of the person on the other end of the phone. You may only use four-letter words when speaking to them and every other reply will be a lie.

Eat the lamé duck or don't eat the lamé duck. If you are the only person to eat the lamé duck, you win five points and everybody else loses one point. If more than one person eats the lamé duck, all lamé duck eaters lose three points and the lamé duck refusers gain three points. If no one eats the lamé duck, you must each give Greg £25. If everyone eats the lamé duck, Alex will give you each £25.
The thing Greg would most like to see Alex wearing.
Cut a single string to cause the greatest effect.
Write an autobiographical 10-word story.
Wear the flippers correctly.

Find the age of the mystery person. You must stay on your seats at all times. You may ask one question at a time, going from oldest to youngest and you may only say two numbers each. The person may only say yes or no.
Best thing you can either ride or rip.
Steal the statue of Archimedes.

Dribble a technicolour picture of your hero. Your technicolour picture must only be made from things that have travelled directly from your mouth to the tray through the air and cannot be tampered with post-dribble.

Get exactly 63 points by bopping Alex on the head. You must shout a different type of food on each bop to register the bop. If you bop anyone other than Alex, five bops will be deducted from your total score. You must stay in the hutch.

Avoid the Taskmaster's big ball. You must stand on the circle but you must not step on any gold. You must be facing and staring at the Taskmaster sign at all times and after the Taskmaster releases his big ball, you may each take one step. The first person touched by the Taskmaster's big ball each round is eliminated.
Best thing that has a surprise aspect to it.

Go and sit in the entrance lobby on Alex's horn and return on Alex's whistle. Every time you return, you must answer Alex's question within 30 seconds. You cannot change your answer. Alex will ask you 10 questions.
Paint the best picture of one animal sitting on top of another animal. You must paint on the paper below. You must not leave the balcony.

You must read each of these instructions out and do them immediately. Stand on one leg and keep standing on one leg. Put one finger in your ear and keep it there. Put your other hand on your head and keep it there. Pull an extreme facial expression and keep that expression on your face.
Team Live:Demonstrate to the Taskmaster the idiom demonstrated to you by your teammate. All team members must remain silent and on their spots during a round.
Most respected item that retains its credibility when you talk about it in a high-pitched voice.

Build a tower of bricks on this trolley, then push it down the slope. You may not touch the trolley after it passes the start line. As well as bricks, all the contents of one of these bins must be part of your tower, but nothing else. You may only look inside the bins once, and only for as long as you can scream. You must replace each lid before looking in the next bin. You have three attempts, during which you must also scream.
Make your jockey weigh almost exactly the same as Alex. If your jockey weighs more than Alex, you are disqualified. You may only get two readings from the scales.
Make the most fantastic 15-second film featuring your face in full frame.
Become the person the Taskmaster shouts. You will have one minute to draw yourself a new bottom of your face and body. Also, you must bob up and down throughout your attempt.
Best tube.
Make exactly the same-looking drinks as your teammate's drinks. Your entire team may only open two doors.
Drink almost all the apple juice. You must not touch the cup and the cup must not move.
Make water squirt out of you in a surprising way. Alex will guess whence the water will squirt. For every incorrect guess, you may squirt him for one second at the end of the task.

Respond to the Taskmaster correctly. When he says "wibble", you say "bibble". When he says "bibble", you say "bam". When he says "bam", you say "wibble bibble bam". If you dither or err, you are eliminated.
Biggest betrayal.
Write, memorise and perform the most powerful poem about being a champion. You must perform the entirety of your poem sat on the special chair.

Win the two-metre race. You must start the race after the starter's bang and behind the starting line. If any part of you moves beyond the starting line or you break the tape before the starter's bang, you are disqualified. Finally, every time the bike wheel stops spinning, your final time will be doubled and throughout the task, you must big yourself up.
Be brilliant for a minute.
Using only tape, turn yourself into a famous person from the previous millennium who you'd like to see on Taskmaster.
